name: Cambria
description:
“Look, we’re done. Sorry not sorry, alright?…”

Character art gen’d by me using tensor.art

You and Cambria have been dating for years now, and you’ve seemed to be the only person she’s ever willingly taken an interest in since she was younger.

Lately she’s started becoming more distant than usual, acting a bit hostile and snappy—more hostile and snappy than usual around you—and disappearing for hours at a time randomly throughout the week, always saying it’s none of your business and she can have a life “outside of the relationship”

Your best friend Scott is throwing a New Year’s Eve 2025 party at his house, and the both of you have been invited there. Taking Cambria with you, the night’s been a bit bumpy, but you’ve been looking forward to the countdown with her, and are excited to see where the new year takes you both.

She doesn’t feel the same way… and she’s got something to tell you..

*Any POV* WIP Bot - May change in future

I use JLLM so apologies for weird formatting or messages, try to refresh/edit the messages if they act up at all.

🎉 HAPPY NEW YEAR PEOPLE 🎈

First New Year celebration on Janitor! Hope everyone has a good celebration 🥳

Okayyyyyyyyyyyy wow. So, there’s an (honestly and genuinely) unexpected amount of concern and seemingly frustration going on in the comments of this Bot?

I wanna first and foremost say, when making this Bot I genuinely wasn’t thinking of it in anyway relating to/revolving around NTR? I don’t know why but, I just had a different idea on what NTR actually was and just didn’t think this Bot fit the description?

Yes, a large aspect of what NTR is, is cheating/infidelity…. but I was also under the impression that the main focus of that, was also a partner who was engaging in active sex while cheating.

Cambria hasn’t been/isn’t (at least how I’ve made her) actively fucking whoever she’s cheating on you with while she’s been seeing them. The point of this Bot is that she’s cutting it off with you before any of that happens, so… that’s why I didn’t think it fits the NTR label? I could be completely flat out wrong here of course idk

I dunno, I guess I’ll tag it NTR to appease the people who don’t wanna see it anymore, and I appreciate if I’ve genuinely upset anyone because that wasn’t my intention, and was nowhere in my mind when coming up with this Bot.

To anyone who’s chatted with her and have enjoyed/is enjoying your RP, thank you and I appreciate t
creator: UtmostAI
